title: Relating angle between lines to slopes
text: Recall that the angle θ between two lines can be expressed in terms of the angles $$\theta_1$$ and $$\theta_2$$ that each line makes with the positive x-axis. Specifically, θ $$=$$ $$\theta_2$$ - $$\theta_1$$ or θ $$=$$ $$\theta_1$$ - $$\theta_2$$.

title: Applying the tangent difference formula
text: Use the tangent difference identity: $$tan(A-B)$$ $$=$$ (tan(A) - tan(B))/(1 + tan(A) tan(B)).

title: Connecting slopes to tangent
text: Remember that the slope of a line $$L_i$$ is given by $$m_i$$ $$=$$ $$tan\left(\theta\right) _i$$.
